name: Cryoport, Inc.
business: Cryoport is a leading global provider of integrated, temperature-controlled supply chain solutions for the life sciences, with a strong focus on supporting the rapidly growing cell and gene therapy (CGT) market. The company's solutions include BioLogistics, BioStorage, BioServices, Cryopreservation, and cryogenic systems manufacturing, delivered through three operating units: Cryoport Systems, CryoGene, and MVE Biological Solutions. Its customers include biopharmaceutical and pharmaceutical companies, animal health markets, reproductive medicine, academic institutions, research, and government agencies.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading global provider of integrated, temperature-controlled supply chain solutions for the life sciences, with a strong focus on supporting the rapidly growing cell and gene therapy (CGT) market.

MVE Biological Solutions (MVE) designs and manufactures industry-leading cryogenic systems, including freezers, dewars, and transport systems used globally for the storage and movement of biological materials for the life sciences.

Our integrated temperature-controlled supply chain solutions combine advanced logistics, biostorage, kitting and labelling, clinical sample management, collection and cryopreservation services for cell therapies starting materials, cryogenic systems manufacturing, and an industry-leading informatics platform that integrates all our solutions.
The Cryoportal Digital Logistics Management Platform serves as the digital nerve center for the Company's fully integrated temperature-controlled supply chain solutions.

We plan to further support these capabilities through the development and application of artificial intelligence (AI) and advanced analytics to aggregated platform data, enabling the Company to manage and anticipate network risks, improve operational performance, and support predictive, data-driven decision-making across the temperature-controlled supply chain.

Our solutions are purpose-built to support a broad range of global life sciences markets, including biopharmaceutical and pharmaceutical companies, the animal health markets, reproductive medicine, academic institutions, research, and government agencies.

catalysts.event: BioServices operations expected to commence at Paris Global Supply Chain Center
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, we commenced BioLogistics services at our new Global Supply Chain Center in Paris, France, with BioServices operations expected to commence in the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Global Supply Chain Center scheduled to open in Santa Ana, California
catalysts.sentence: In late 2026 another Global Supply Chain Center is scheduled to be opened in Santa Ana, California.

catalysts.event: CryoGene biorepository scheduled to open in Tampa, Florida
catalysts.sentence: CryoGene is scheduled to open its third biorepository in Tampa, FL in mid 2027 with a primary purpose of supporting Moffitt Cancer Center.

catalysts.event: Expanded MVE manufacturing line in Chengdu, China expected to commence production
catalysts.sentence: Expanded MVE's manufacturing line in Chengdu, China to support cryogenic freezer manufacturing with production expected to commence during the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: MVE plans to introduce the CryoVerse Ecosystem
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, MVE plans to introduce a proprietary connected platform, the MVE CryoVerse Ecosystem, delivering real-time monitoring and cloud visibility to protect critical biological materials while simplifying operations and strengthening compliance.

tamClaims.claim: Global CGT market sales were approximately $14.5 billion in 2024, growing at a historical 28% CAGR from $4.2 billion in 2019.
tamClaims.sentence: Global sales in the CGT market increased to approximately $14.5 billion in 2024, up from $4.2 billion in 2019, representing a historical 28% compound annual growth rate (CAGR).

tamClaims.claim: Industry analysts project the CGT market to grow at an estimated 34% CAGR through 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: Industry analysts project continued momentum, with the CGT market expected to grow at an estimated 34% CAGR through 2028.

tamClaims.claim: Over 1,100 active cell and gene therapy clinical trials globally (excluding China) in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The clinical pipeline remains robust, with over 1,100 active cell and gene therapy clinical trials globally, excluding China, in 2025, increasingly weighted toward late-stage Phase II and III programs as sponsors are prioritizing cell and gene therapies closer to commercialization.
